h3ad5ecdagce7bg44fega325g481183dac836: Hear my voice. Obey my command.
h43769a7cg3a70g49f0g9db7g0a4e01adb536: *The voice is irresistible. You recognise the overwhelming authority that you'd used on others, only infinitely stronger, and turned against you...*
h8157c074g6918g42a2g9d45g9fda6281c2bd: *Your vision clouds, leaving you in a dark, featureless shadowscape. Nothingness in every direction.*
hb3f7395ag5ee1g46e7g9465gb1048b76068b: *Then, there are three figures before you. An armoured male elf, exuding power and command. A handsome younger man with a quick, easy smile. And a pale young woman with even paler eyes...*
h2064a0c1g7dddg4d19ga43fg7e0eec752b12: These are my Chosen. They speak for me.
h2d68bb07g0020g4086gb0c3g386a63bd76d8: Aid their search for the weapon, and you will be worthy to stand beside them. In my presence.
h60cc2164gce34g4ad5g9a69ge0d8a008f763: *You feel energy pulsing from the artefact. Lifting the pain from you. Pushing the voice away.*
h9691bfd0gbb5eg4124g8531gab109021b511: My power grows. My forces gather. The reckoning draws near...
h016ff6a1ge902g499fgbe92gb2187d565516: Don't give me that look. I don't know what just happened any more than you do. We should keep going.
h103da69bg9600g48ddg978cgefc4663b624f: The voice is gone - muted by this... this gith relic. Why does a half-elf carry it?
hb424d561g1ed9g4f4agaccdg30be5b3b326d: You've got some explaining to do first - what is that thing you have?
h4d79ae8ag1f92g46f9g9bd7g61e19c3918d7: The vision... that voice - what was it?
hada89922g04d8g47f7g8045g5df2c4c09e4a: I think that was the Absolute speaking to us... but we managed to shield ourselves. We should keep moving.
h8ca089fag460cg4210ga5a0g062b35c0bc1c: I'm not sure I want to know - but it's gone now. We should keep moving.
h7ed2bf50g9b4bg4588g8aa2ga6d63a2e80ce: Hold on - that artefact seemed to stop the voice. What is it?
h8bbb6d41g4853g49a1gac7fg0961df3cc23d: That power... is that what happens to others, when we use the parasite on them?
h093aa3a8ga797g41a8gbba9ga28887e4ab83: Perhaps, but whatever it was, I don't want to experience it again.
h5a4f1df8g77deg4b70gac35g24739d375350: Seems that trinket's important. Keep it close.
hbc2a32a6g7f4dg48e0ga83bg7130bccaf51e: Trust me, I will. Let's keep going.
h85b7861egd040g4b20gbb83g7fec73ba9015: Hold on - at least tell me what it is first.
hf14c6fa6g4c54g4b70gbf51gd792f1af4f17: I don't know... not exactly. All I know is it's important I get it back to Baldur's Gate. At any cost.
h2ed559bcg1cbcg4977ga08cg2b35435869af: Not good enough. Explain yourself, or I'll cut you loose.
h3aed5f1bg0143g4de6g8b6ag815a7832e8bc: Wait. I don't know what this thing is. All I know is that I've to get it to Baldur's Gate, at any cost. That's all I have for you.
he4af6bf3g4a64g4a4fg820dg3c7ee3164e82: My home - a cloister of Shar followers, hidden in the city.
hb5e18cbcg9a02g44cag9514g236892dd19e9: A group of us were sent to retrieve the artefact. Now I'm the only one left. I can't afford to fail.
h1bdc051eg14d4g44c3g92e2g66551226a3fc: Why Baldur's Gate? What aren't you telling me?
h1e1557abgc5b7g4dbfgb976g64c3bd0e2a35: I suppose if we're to continue together, I may as well tell you. I serve Shar. My home is a secret cloister in Baldur's Gate.
hc2abc374g9a1eg48e3ga491g22061c1ca24c: If you don't know what it is, how do you have it?
he490e0a8g3699g47c8ga0a3ged7c41cef86a: Because it was our mission to retrieve it - me and... the others. I'm the only one who made it.
h9046f854ge8bcg477eg85eeg85381b35a176: And exactly what did retrieving the artefact entail?
hb8a02446g259eg4d0agb37fg584aa0218ca6: You must know something about what that thing is.
h42f58269gcc46g4926g8cf2gdf114436b03f: There must be more to it - I need you to level with me.
hc4667921g99b0g49b8gb763g04c7440ece08: I... I am a servant of Shar. My home is a secret cloister in Baldur's Gate. I need to bring that artefact back there, no matter what.
h80a26e63g4090g441agb83eg971dc89f47b9: I can't tell you any more. This mission required utmost secrecy - we all submitted to having our memories suppressed so that we couldn't betray Shar's confidence.
hfb150b52g537fg46deg8a53gc20dc830e37d: If I reach my contact in the city, I'll have my memories restored. Until then, I have to guard the artefact with my life.
hd530761cge2efg43c5gbcf2g447c295e0f81: There - you have the truth, for all it's worth. Let's continue.
h778eb87fg6feeg4549g86e0ga5389756741b: You've been lying to me. How long were you going to keep this secret?
h97711602ga87eg4b13g9589g9c91e8b7b934: Forever, ideally. And you assume too much about what I can and cannot tell.
h226a92bbg0489g4822gaa8fg6f66ebb274ba: Secrecy is everything for Shar's children. It's our code, our creed, our shield.
h2137d926ga26ag491bgabbbg2026058f6b2e: I even keep secrets from myself - I had my memories suppressed, so that nothing I knew could be used against the Dark Lady. Once I prove myself, my memories will be restored.
hd14ac9b5g7533g448cga03cgce07bea3432b: I'm not sorry I kept this from you. Not one bit.
h6654ebd9g9c73g4223gabe2gfb64e50142a7: Though perhaps that might change, if you can show an open mind.
h9281d372ge5c8g4bdcgb58agbc0426c56ea0: Let's see how open-minded I can be then: tell me more.
h184b94a3ga571g460fg8e5bga8c59355fd07: Talk to me later. We've got more pressing matters to see to right now.
ha4e92161g0868g4af8g9473gf4613a12724f: We can discuss this later. But let's just try a little more honesty going foward.
h0485a97aga9b8g47b3g8f26gcf12c109228a: All we can do is try, I suppose...
h6f59c06bg9085g4bcbgb6e6g3e3d955a328b: I don't know how I feel about this.
hf1bbaa23g0916g46c2g85c8g1543dc21cbf3: Who says you have to feel anything?
hc38a0417gc813g491dg9ca0gfec2d34f43c8: Gather your thoughts. Then perhaps we can talk some more.
h711b2454gff2ag48aag83bcg9dd43f255119: How did you come into possession of that artefact exactly?
hbbfb73d5g0dfcg4793ga6a7gdd60436fea2c: There's nothing more I can tell you. All I remember is that I have to get back to my contact in the city.
haf8eb22ag2bacg4e60gb018gd07c39d2cb0f: I know those symbols - githyanki runes. Ancient as Vlaakith herself. You stole that from my people.
hbc4cff7fg57b1g40ecga161g66c4c12a863b: Yes, and a lot of my people died in the process. I won't fail them - not after what I saw your kind do to them.
h3b508275g0b34g42f6ga072g04a548b39730: Enough, both of you. We need to work together.
h7764d554gab8bg4c6eg9ed9ge0e788bd8075: For now. But any crimes against my kin will be answered for, in time.
he8415eb5g10e7g4b86g909dgc1f4a2adb06e: I just saved you. Keep that in mind, next time you want to air your grievances.
hb7875e55gb423g4c04gb4bcg35b15c0fba02: Agreed. There's too much at stake for petty squabbles.
hb6876912g9059g41b1gb968gf21bbb9cfa2b: Keep that thing safe - seems we'll need it.
h8a0baa33g7dd1g4478gb8dfgff7ae86301c8: Trust me, I'll guard it with my life. Let's keep going.
hea0b9b06g7e02g497egb7acg7a5c452dd69e: Give me the artefact. Better if I hold onto it.
h08e46223g497bg4bd3ga307g37e1fe8f7b67: I trust you more than most, but I'm sorry - that's too much to ask. This is my responsibility.
h23ff291dg75eag4eb9gb343gddf5ec5c9fd3: Just take care of it. Seems like it's as important to me as it is to you.
h94b40abegd5d8g4cbag92c7g8356c2741809: I wouldn't quite say that, but it'll be safe with me. Let's go.
h6c5bcc33g51b2g4947g8670g395b49669e8c: I can't trust you. Best if we travel separately for now.
h371b2a79gd252g435dga5b7g63391e97aef8: If you insist. Don't expect to fare well without me to save you.
hd685223ag8a0bg4660g98c4g07ad34d7645d: I want to know about your Shar worship before we go any farther.
hf8a91ef0g7896g4c54g824bg3e20db9394bb: If you insist. But make it quick - we have far bigger concerns.
hb5b9c994g10ccg4be7g86dfg837f233a3ff1: Out of the question. This is my mission - I won't just give it away.
h741bf84bg3a47g4c8eg84b5g6bffee2f2e3b: Tell me about the artefact. What just happened?
hc8b23498g85f6g4c59gad59g2cad574e6c42: It's been some time since I met another faithful of Shar. Are you versed in her teachings?
hadd2e1dbg47a5g4db7g9d5dgf0fdb05e3579: Of course I am. But we can talk about this later - let's go.
h1bd4b19bga35cg46d1g837bgbedb2d8d7e64: I don't care who you worship. Tell me about the box.
h77d69660gfedcg42ceg87a7g460e19a265cd: I didn't agree to join up with a Shar worshipper.
h9c2ff214gb643g46bcga861g52365fd0e581: Then it's your own fault for not asking.
he8a1edfagec06g4610g82a9g8fc9b4f95e81: Now that the truth's out, tell me more.
hbd6fba04g2d60g48c7gaf10gd2347ca9adaa: In future, I expect you to be honest. Let's leave it at that for now.
h7c032367g8275g4096ga18fg1ecbf04711c7: Your faith is your own concern, not mine.
h6f205653gd8afg4930gb794g1204df828919: True. I didn't think you'd react so pragmatically. Perhaps I should have told you sooner.
ha1ede9b3g5900g4df1gad4eg0567af18fd76: Shar is an abomination. You deceived me.
hc647716bga097g4ccdga530g70c39c32a314: Your blindness as much as my deception, Selûnite. We can talk about this later - if you're willing.
h160744b7gb82ag459bg8763gc8e4ce47c0af: I bow to Shar also. The Dark Lady must favour us, to have brought us together.
hc90c02b0g96f8g4555ga290g9d64285ce2b4: I... yes, she must. I'll offer thanks to her in my prayers - and we should speak more later. Alone, ideally.
h25547775g295cg45fagacb9g497e673a3a6b: Fantastic. Monsters in our minds, and around our campfire.
h6becebcfgdce8g4063g9ea7g031858cee8ff: Heavens forbid. We're all entitled to our secrets.
h691cba23g9991g4002ga45bgdd547850ad68: Knew there was something off about you. Wasn't expecting this though
h630b2af7g3fb9g46b7g888fg6827e769066c: A Shar worshipper? Not my usual quarry - nor my usual ally.
h4aead6b6g5c6fg45a8gb58dg75f4f75ff640: You worship Shar? Blimey. She and my beloved Mystra are not exactly friends.
h7283da66g7c5fg4726gb2cegdd1e5607501d: Then go ahead. It won't change what I have to say to you.
h292db3e9gf8e7g4bb1ga977gd658561eabd5: That was far from nothing. Tell me what you know, please.
h7fe68aafgaa11g4032g86d7g91e3112d0aba: I told you already, now forget it. Let's keep going.
h55c51fa1g6d98g4f42g99a3g574cc89bbfad: |Reacts to the voice and apparent protection received from the artefact that SH has - NOTE: SH is already in-party for this inclusion|
h57f504e7g1acbg4da3g917agf3c71632d5a7: |Reacts to the voice and apparent protection received from the artefact that SH has - NOTE: SH is already in-party for this inclusion|
hf253da4fgfb0ag4987g94b5g9a6820e46d03: I don't know what that toy of hers is, but I'm glad it's on our side.
ha2a734f8g0ec2g4b1dg86a3g83c57f5fbdd9: |Reacts to the voice and apparent protection received from the artefact that SH has - NOTE: SH is already in-party for this inclusion|
hc9e5efd9g11b4g46e4gb595g5973521d0345: Isn't that something? The artefact scattered the voice to the four winds.
h1f969022g14aeg4240g8bc7gbd15a6d58ce9: That's an unusual artefact you have there, Shadowheart. A most unlikely protector...
hd79f802fg7debg42c2gad77g6b99f4a82599: I imagine you must have questions. We should talk.
hde9a553bg37d6g4edcgaaafg8d03ca32eaa1: *The voice is irresistible. Every word is drenched with a power and authority that you do not understand, but cannot deny.*
